revision.comment: testing...will revert if failed in 3 minutes
revision.text:
{| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%" |width="30%" align="center" rowspan="{{{rows}}}"|Preceded by:
'''{{{before}}}'''

revision.text:
{| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%" |width="30%" align="center" rowspan="{{{rows}}}"|Preceded by:
'''{{{before}}}''' |- style="text-align: center;"

{| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%" |- style="text-align: center;" |width="30%" align="center" rowspan="{{{rows}}}"|Preceded by:
'''{{{before}}}'''

{| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%" |- style="text-align: center;" width="30%" align="center" rowspan="{{{rows}}}"|Preceded by:
'''{{{before}}}'''

{| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%" |- style="text-align: center;" |width="30%" align="center" rowspan="{{{rows}}}"|Preceded by:
'''{{{before}}}'''

revision.comment: suggest colon unnecessary as text does not follow on same line
add new parameter "as" per [[Wikipedia talk:WikiProject Succession Box Standardization#Proposal: Additional Parameter in Template:s-bef and Template:s-aft|discussion]]
new params: before2, before3, before4, before 5 .... per [[Wikipedia_talk:SBS#Proposal:_Creation_of_additional_parameters_for_s-bef_and_s-aft]]
Changed protection level of Template:S-bef: allow template editors to modify ([Edit=Protected template] (indefinite) [Move=Protected template] (indefinite))
Undid revision 784137214 by [[Special:Contributions/Ahecht|Ahecht]] ([[User talk:Ahecht|talk]]) Site CSS fixed — workaround no longer needed
change span to div to allow manual line breaks in wikitext; should not have any effect on rendered pages.
rm br tags that produce excessive white space; not needed now that we have div tags

revision.text:
|- style="text-align:center" | style="width:30%" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"|{{#if:{{{beforetitle|}}}|{{{beforetitle}}}|先代}}
{{{before}}}{{#if:{{{before2|}}}|
{{{before2}}}}}{{#if:{{{before3|}}}|
{{{before3}}}}}{{#if:{{{before4|}}}|
{{{before4}}}}}{{#if:{{{before5|}}}|
{{{before5}}}}}{{#if:{{{before6|}}}|
{{{before6}}}}}{{#if:{{{before7|}}}|
{{{before7}}}}}{{#if:{{{before8|}}}|
{{{before8}}}}}{{#if:{{{before9|}}}|
{{{before9}}}}}{{#if:{{{before10|}}}|
{{{before10}}}}}{{#if:{{{beforenote|}}}|
''{{{beforenote}}}''}}{{#if:{{{as|}}}|
''{{{as}}}として''}} {{Pp-template}} [[Category:継承テンプレート|S-bef]]

revision.comment: tracking to [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]
revision.text:
|- style="text-align:center;" |style="width:30%;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"|Preceded by
{{Delink question hyphen-minus|{{{before}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before2|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before3|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before4|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before5|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before6|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before7|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before8|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before9|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before10|}}}}}
{{#if:{{{as|}}}|'''''as {{{as}}}'''''}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]}} {{documentation}}

|- style="text-align:center;" |style="width:30%;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"|Preceded by
{{Delink question hyphen-minus|{{{before}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before2|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before3|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before4|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before5|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before6|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before7|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before8|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before9|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before10|}}}}}
{{#if:{{{as|}}}|'''''as {{{as}}}'''''}}{{main other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]}}}} {{documentation}}

|- style="text-align:center;" |style="width:30%;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"|Preceded by
{{Delink question hyphen-minus|{{{before}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before2|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before3|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before4|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before5|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before6|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before7|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before8|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before9|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before10|}}}}}
{{#if:{{{as|}}}|'''''as {{{as}}}'''''}}{{main other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: don't test "before" param if it is blank
revision.text:
|- style="text-align:center;" |style="width:30%;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"|Preceded by
{{Delink question hyphen-minus|{{{before}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before2|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before3|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before4|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before5|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before6|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before7|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before8|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before9|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before10|}}}}}
{{#if:{{{as|}}}|'''''as {{{as}}}'''''}}{{main other|{{#if: {{{before|}}} | {{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]}}}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: track misuse to [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']]
revision.text:
|- style="text-align:center;" |style="width:30%;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"|Preceded by
{{Delink question hyphen-minus|{{{before}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before2|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before3|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before4|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before5|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before6|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before7|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before8|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before9|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before10|}}}}}
{{#if:{{{as|}}}|'''''as {{{as}}}'''''}}{{main other|{{#if: {{{before|}}} | {{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH||[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH|| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']]}}}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
|- style="text-align:center;" |style="width:30%;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"|Preceded by
{{Delink question hyphen-minus|{{{before}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before2|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before3|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before4|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before5|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before6|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before7|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before8|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before9|}}}}}{{S-bef/filter|{{{before10|}}}}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 63 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:S-bef]]
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]
